---
title: "Cradock Nowell: A Tale of the New Forest "
---

## Cradock Nowell: A Tale of the New Forest 

**Author:** Richard Doddridge Blackmore
**Date:** 1866
**Imprint:** London: Chapman and Hall

### Notes

It was originally serialized in <i>Macmillan\'s Magazine</i> (May 1865-August 1866).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
